posts.author: patrick.crawley (Patrick Crawley)
posts.cookedHtml:
When I started using WorkForms I was offered integrated automations based on the forms. I created an automation

image1471×145 15.2 KB

This works nicely. It also means the automation won’t be used when creating an item directly in the board itself.

This is now not offered as automation and I cannot find any reference to it. All other topcs on this forum provide te solution of using standard automations for item creation. This does not work for m workflow.

Please confirm why thias removed, and how to get t back. I feel like this is a regression.
